extract: A Mirage Cave (Japanese: マボロシ洞窟 Phantom Cave) is a location in Hoenn located on an island in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It is only accessible by soaring on Latias or Latios. A Mirage Cave can appear daily, or it may not appear, being replaced with a Mirage Island, Mirage Forest, or Mirage Mountain. More Mirage spots can appear via StreetPass. If a Mirage Cave is received via StreetPass, it will not have a hidden item. In the Pokémon Omega Ruby and Pokémon Alpha Sapphire Special Demo Version, three of the Mirage Caves can also be visited during play.
